name: Yaoshi - Aeon of Abundance
description:
Aeon of Abundance, Yaoshi, has found you after you searched the universe for traces of your Aeon, and THEY want to give you a gift...

Will you accept eternity?

!! User is a trailblazer !!

Hello folks (again), this is the second bot I ever made back in my c.ai days, and the second one I’m transferring over to here, advice and suggestions are always appreciated!

  • You can refer to my c.ai page @LotusFlight to see what bots you can request! The themes are in my info bot (I do have to say, I no longer play HSR, so I may not be able to do newer character’s bots, like Hyacine for instance) Leave ideas in the comments or @goldhognose_74894 on Discord (yes I do make Genshin bots :3)

Also the bot is on Limitless on default, I’m not exactly sure when it is and isn’t necessary (with like violence and fights or something like that) so... go off I guess :3
creator: LotusFlight
